Release Notes for X-CUBE-53L9A1

Copyright © 2026 STMicroelectronics

Purpose

The X-CUBE-53L9A1 software pack is an expansion for STM32Cube that aims to explain and showcase use cases of the VL53L9CX dToF 3D lidar on STM32 microcontrollers. Applications are built on top of VL53L9CX component driver and middleware that come with this package.

Preconfigured are provided projects for the main supported toolchains.

For further information regarding the supported products please refer to:

  • VL53L9CX on st.com
  • Getting started with X-CUBE-53L9A1

Update history

Main changes

First release

Initial release providing support of the VL53L9CX on NUCLEO-H563ZI.

Contents

Component name Version Release note
STM32H5xx CMSIS V1.4.0 release note URL
STM32H5xx HAL V1.5.0 release note URL
BSP Component VL53L9CX V1.0.0 release note URL
vl53l9-transform-c V1.3.1 release note URL
media-object V1.0.0 release note URL

Known limitations

Headline
NTR

Development toolchains and compilers

  • IAR System Workbench V9.60.3
  • ARM Keil V5.38
  • STM32CubeIDE v2.0.0

Supported devices and boards

  • NUCLEO-H563ZI rev. MB1404C
  • X-NUCLEO-53L9A1 / VL53L9CX

Backward compatibility

N/A

Dependencies

This software is compatible with:

  • STM32CubeHAL H5 V1.5.0

For complete documentation on STM32Cube Expansion Packages, visit: STM32Cube Expansion Packages
